ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "vis_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "vis_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the visiting team */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "ot" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "exp_score_home" REAL /* Expected score for the home team */,
  "exp_score_vis" REAL /* Expected score for the visiting team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each quarter */,
  "playoffs" INTEGER /* Whether the game is part of the playoffs */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_vis_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("vis_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_initial" TEXT /* Initial abbreviation of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current head coach */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's Twitter handle */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the referee */,
  "referee_position" TEXT /* Position of the referee (e.g., lead, wing) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the referee (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Referee's Twitter handle */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the referee's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_referees" (
  "game_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee's game entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the referee's performance in the game (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_referees_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_referees_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "opened" INTEGER /* Year the venue was opened */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the venue's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_venues" (
  "game_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game's venue entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venues_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "fired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was fired (if applicable) */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Coach's Twitter handle */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_coaches" (
  "game_coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach's game entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_coaches_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_coaches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the game */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points allowed */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
